title: ShapesConfig
description: config/shapes.json - the puzzle layout catalog. Matrix-only after the Row 9d contract close: the single entry is grid (the seating-row/round-table positional engine is retired). Each entry names its glyph, entity ceiling, ordinal-axis flag, allowed slot rules, and topology. Human-edited (CLAUDE.md #6).

evolution.change: Initial machine-checkable formalization of config/shapes.json: each shapeId -> {glyph,max_entities,ordinal_axis,slot_rules[],topology,v}.
evolution.why: The layout catalog must be schema-validated so a shape with a bad topology or missing slot_rules fails fast at build (CLAUDE.md #6).

evolution.change: Retired the seating-row + round-table entries (matrix-only, Row 9d). The catalog now requires exactly the grid entry.
evolution.why: The generator + frontend are matrix-only after the legacy positional engine retirement, so the layout catalog carries only grid.
